rows.blocker: reconciled through existing official Nasdaq Nordic Stockholm shares, share-search, ETF, tracker, Spotlight, and NGM feeds
rows.notes: The current official source layer already has Stockholm screener/search feeds plus adjacent Swedish venue feeds for Spotlight and NGM. Remaining STO gaps are field-level metadata or listing normalization work, not a missing source-discovery item.

rows.blocker: implemented via browser-captured official ASP.NET ViewState; raw non-browser requests still hit the EGX/TSPD challenge
rows.notes: The official EGX ListedStocks.aspx page exposes company name, ISIN, and EGX sector in __VIEWSTATE after the browser challenge. The parser conservatively matches by existing EGX ISIN because the decoded strings do not expose a clean ticker column.

rows.blocker: implemented by mapping the existing official ASX listed-companies CSV GICS industry-group column to canonical stock_sector values
rows.notes: The reachable official ASX listed-companies CSV exposes Company name, ASX code, and GICS industry group. Parser keeps the existing ASX symbol/name coverage and now maps GICS industry groups to canonical stock sectors; Not Applic/Class Pend remain empty and ETF categories still require the ASX investment-products workbook or name classifier.

rows.blocker: active stock-market pages are Incapsula-blocked from this environment; implemented reachable official sector-classification PDF as a conservative listed-company subset
rows.notes: The official ATHEX sector-classification PDF exposes ISIN, symbol, company name, and sector classification for many current ATHEX stock rows. A true active exchange-directory endpoint is still needed for full ATHEX coverage.

rows.blocker: implemented via existing official SZSE report-list industry fields
rows.notes: SZSE A/B-share report rows and workbooks expose official 所属行业/sshymc CSRC industry values. The parser now maps those top-level CSRC codes to canonical stock_sector values; ETF category gaps still need a fund taxonomy/name-classifier path.

rows.blocker: implemented via existing official SSE stock-list CSRC_CODE fields
rows.notes: SSE stock-list records expose official CSRC industry codes/descriptions. The parser now maps those top-level CSRC codes to canonical stock_sector values; ETF category gaps still need a fund taxonomy/name-classifier path.

rows.blocker: resolved by scripts/backfill_stockanalysis_metadata.py as a reviewed secondary company-profile source because official TPEX/MOPS feeds identify the KY issuers but do not expose their foreign ISINs
rows.notes: TPEX stock-sector and ETF-category coverage is complete for the current universe after the official TPEX/MOPS parser work. The remaining KY foreign-issuer ISIN tail was filled from StockAnalysis company pages through metadata_updates.csv with exact exchange URL, issuer-name, and ISIN-checksum gates; it is intentionally labeled as reviewed secondary metadata, not official exchange data.

rows.blocker: implemented via the official SIX FQS ref.json detail endpoint; residual gaps are now data-level taxonomy mapping only
rows.notes: The parser queries current SIX listing gaps by ISIN and maps official IndustrySectorDesc for stocks plus AssetClassDesc for ETF categories. Rows are gated back to the local SIX listing by ISIN and preserve the local ticker when the official ValorSymbol differs from the dataset ticker.

rows.blocker: resolved by scripts/backfill_stockanalysis_metadata.py as a reviewed secondary company-profile source after official HOSE/VSDC feeds did not expose the single LCG stock-sector residual
rows.notes: Existing HOSE stock, ETF, and fund-certificate sources cover current HOSE identifiers. The residual LCG sector was filled from StockAnalysis company-profile industry metadata through metadata_updates.csv with issuer-name and exact exchange URL gates; it is intentionally labeled as reviewed secondary metadata, not official exchange data.

rows.blocker: implemented via official BMV issuer market-data/profile pages; some local trust/equity rows still omit ISIN in the reachable BMV instrument table
rows.notes: The official BMV search feed exposes issuer IDs and the issuer estadisticas/perfil pages expose instrument ISIN rows plus stock-sector and ETF taxonomy labels. Parser uses search only as the page locator and gates output by current BMV listings.

rows.blocker: parser implemented via official BME ListedCompanies API with SIBE, Floor, Latibex, MTF, and ETF trading-system parameters; live refresh is currently host-blocked/403 from this environment, and partial caches are ignored
rows.notes: The official BME Market API exposes ISIN, issuer name, trading system, sector, and subsector for the full security-price universe. Detail calls provide the official ticker used by the reference parser; residual local ticker drift should be handled through reviewed normalization rather than silently trusting secondary symbols.

rows.blocker: stock-sector taxonomy still not exposed by the reachable marketdata endpoint
rows.notes: Existing official TASE ETF marketdata records expose Classification values; the parser now maps these to canonical etf_category buckets. Reachable stock security records still do not expose a usable sector taxonomy, so residual stock_sector gaps need a separate company-profile endpoint or reviewed secondary source.

rows.blocker: implemented by extending existing official JSE instrument profile parser to read Sector/Industry fields; reachable instrument pages still do not expose ISIN values, so residual ISIN gaps need a separate official registry or reviewed issuer filings
rows.notes: JSE instrument profile pages expose instrument code/name/type plus Sector and Industry. Parser now maps the official Industry value into canonical stock_sector; ISIN is not present in the reachable profile HTML.

rows.blocker: implemented by extending existing official GPW/NewConnect list parsers to read the sector label from result rows; residual gaps are mostly unclassified official labels or ETF category tail
rows.notes: The reachable GPW and NewConnect list pages expose granular sector labels in the official result HTML. Parser now maps conservative Polish sector labels to canonical stock_sector values without using a secondary source.

rows.blocker: implemented via official listed-securities table
rows.notes: Parser extracts active equity rows with ticker, ISIN, issuer name, and listed status from the official ZSE shares page.

rows.blocker: reconciled through existing official Nasdaq Nordic Copenhagen shares, share-search, ETF, and ETF-search feeds
rows.notes: The current official source layer already has Copenhagen screener and search feeds for shares plus ETF coverage. Remaining CPH gaps are field-level metadata or listing normalization work, not a missing source-discovery item.

rows.blocker: implemented via official embedded market-data feed; residual local shortcut tickers need explicit symbol alias review

rows.blocker: parser implemented; residual gaps need ticker-level review

rows.blocker: implemented as ISIN join against current VSE listings
rows.notes: Official table contains ISIN and issuer but no ticker; parser conservatively emits only current VSE listings matched by ISIN.

rows.blocker: implemented via official companies page with conservative local listing-name matching

rows.blocker: reconciled through existing official Nasdaq Nordic Helsinki shares, share-search, and ETF feeds

rows.blocker: implemented via official market pages plus detail-page ticker extraction

rows.blocker: implemented via official ZSE front-end API and price-sheet API

Grey and Expert Market access remain excluded intentionally so OTC stays an extended/listing-scope policy area rather than leaking into core primary completeness.

rows.blocker: implemented through the existing official KRX listed-company endpoint; residual KOSDAQ gaps are field-level review issues rather than a missing source-discovery item
